name: Soketi
tagline: Soketi is your simple, fast, and resilient open-source WebSockets server.
description:
Soketi is your simple, fast, and resilient open-source WebSockets server.

Docs: https://docs.soketi.app?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  soketi:
    image: quay.io/soketi/soketi:1.6-16-debian
    environment:
      - SOKETI_DEBUG=${DEBUG:-0}
      - SOKETI_DEFAULT_APP_ID=ua76f40e6b4
      - SOKETI_DEFAULT_APP_KEY=YWZhMWFkN2I3NjFlY2QzZDA3MjAzZmMx
      - SOKETI_DEFAULT_APP_SECRET=NjJmNDY0MzY0ZmNiZmMxNzY1NTZhNjFh
      - SOKETI_PUSHER_SCHEME=${SOKETI_PUSHER_SCHEME:-https}
      - SOKETI_DEFAULT_APP_ENABLE_CLIENT_MESSAGES=${DEFAULT_APP_ENABLE_CLIENT_MESSAGES}
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - bash -c ':> /dev/tcp/127.0.0.1/6001' || exit 1
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 3
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42114:6001
